# HumanSourcer

> HumanSourcer is a directory of expert AI-training and evaluation networks
> (e.g. Mercor, Alignerr, Vetto, Pareto). Each profile documents the actual
> operating parent company, the worker-facing access point, domain
> specialization, access model, geography, and ownership confidence — with a
> cited evidence URL for every ownership and status claim.

## Purpose

This site helps AI researchers, data-labeling professionals, and subject-matter
experts find and compare the worker-facing entry points for expert AI-training
networks. It is not affiliated with any listed provider.

## Key pages

- /: full comparison directory of expert-tier AI-training networks, filterable
  by domain, access model, and geography.

Provider profile pages are listed in /sitemap-index.xml.
